TargetDiamond: This represents the goal amount of diamonds the room needs to achieve (e.g., 1,000,000).Once this target is reached, it may trigger certain rewards or unlock new features.
ConditionGroeth: Define the minimum number of visitors required for the room to gain more visibility or unlock new benefits.You can customize this condition based on room performance.
NumberSeats: Indicates how many admins are currently assigned to this room.When the room achieves its diamond target, more admin seats can be unlocked.(Hint: If a room starts with 4 admins and hits the target, it can increase to 5 admins.
ProfitsTargetTotal: The total profit in coins generated from the room’s performance.This value will later be divided among the room owner and admins based on their profit percentages.

superadminDescription:
To ensure smooth operations, it's essential to create a virtual country manager that you manage. All agencies that aren't affiliated with a specific country manager are automatically assigned to this virtual BD.
When a country manager is deleted, the agencies associated with it are transferred to the virtual country manager, ensuring uninterrupted management. If there isn't a virtual country manager, the user will need to enter the country manager ID when requesting to open an agency, but they won't be able to operate it without a specific country manager.
Therefore, it's always advisable to create and manage a virtual country manager to ensure continuity of operations.
You cannot delete the default super admi: You cannot delete the default country manager.
You cannot delete a super admin created: You cannot delete a country manager created by the owner.
No default super admin found to transfer: No default country manager found to transfer agencies to.
superAdminRewardDescription: The country manager Reward feature allows you to choose a country manager and assign rewards with an expiration date and a reward limit. The selected country manager can then dedicate these rewards to users in the same country, within the limit of the assigned number of rewards.

bdDescription:
To ensure smooth operations, it's essential to create a virtual BD that you manage. All agencies that aren't affiliated with a specific BD are automatically assigned to this virtual BD.
When a BD is deleted, the agencies associated with it are transferred to the virtual BD, ensuring uninterrupted management. If there isn't a virtual BD, the user will need to enter the BD ID when requesting to open an agency, but they won't be able to operate it without a specific BD.
Therefore, it's always advisable to create and manage a virtual BD to ensure continuity of operations.

areaManagerDescription: To ensure smooth operations, it is necessary to create a default Area Manager under your supervision. All countries or agencies that do not belong to a specific Area Manager are automatically assigned to this default manager. When an Area Manager is deleted, the associated countries or agencies are transferred to the default manager, ensuring uninterrupted management. If no default Area Manager exists, users must specify an Area Manager when opening any country or agency, and they will not be able to operate it without a designated manager. Therefore, it is always recommended to create and manage a default Area Manager to guarantee continuous operational workflow without complications.
